goal: 重新审视 idea-miner 的存储与 handoff 工作流，确保自动化运行时沉淀 handoff-ready idea dossier，避免后续 handoff 重新搜索

summary.title: 为 idea-miner 增加可交接 idea dossier
summary.what: 在 idea-discovery-workflow 中加入 Handoff Mode、handoff-ready dossier 存储契约、run artifact 持久化要求、默认自动化提示更新，以及一个按 idea 名解析 dossier 并导出临时 handoff 文件的 helper 脚本。
summary.why: 用户希望以后一句话指定某个 idea 就能快速交接全部上下文，而不是在 handoff 阶段重新搜索信源、竞品和历史判断。
summary.user_goal: 重新审视 idea-miner 的存储与 handoff 工作流，确保自动化运行时沉淀 handoff-ready idea dossier，避免后续 handoff 重新搜索

decisions.chose: 集成到 idea-discovery-workflow 的 artifact/handoff 子流程
decisions.rationale: handoff 依赖 run、memory、report 和 per-idea artifacts，属于 discovery workflow 层；ai-founder-playbook 继续只负责判断和拷打。
rejected: 复制或 vendoring 通用 handoff skill
把 handoff 逻辑放进 ai-founder-playbook

decisions.point: handoff 默认是否重新联网
decisions.chose: 默认读取已存 dossier，不重新做 source discovery 或竞品扫描
decisions.rationale: handoff 应该是包装已有上下文，只有用户明确要求当前刷新时才补查。

decisions.point: handoff 输出是否建议下一步 skills
decisions.rationale: 不同用户环境的 skills 不一致，handoff 应聚焦 idea 上下文和可执行下一步。

rejected.alternative: 只继续依赖顶层 JSONL 索引
rejected.reason: ideas.jsonl/claims.jsonl 等只适合搜索和回忆，不足以支撑详细 handoff。
当前瓶颈是详细 dossier 没有落盘，不是关系查询性能。

review_notes: 验证过新增 helper 脚本的 node --check。
用临时 IDEA_MINER_HOME 验证了 idea-handoff.mjs 能按 alias 解析 dossier 并写出 mktemp handoff 文件。
用现有 legacy store 验证了缺少 dossier 时会返回可重建提示，而不是静默重新搜索。

architectural_claims: idea-discovery-workflow now owns handoff-ready run artifacts for idea discovery outputs.
Top-level JSONL files are treated as indexes; detailed handoff context belongs in per-run idea dossiers.
Handoff mode packages stored context and only refreshes current facts when explicitly requested.
behavioral_changes: Recurring runs are instructed to persist report.md, source-notes.jsonl, per-idea JSON, per-idea Markdown dossiers, and handoff-index.md.
One-line handoff requests can resolve a stored idea by name, alias, merged name, or dossier filename.
The default automation prompt now treats evidence persistence and handoff artifact persistence as mandatory.

data_model_changes.name: handoff-ready run artifacts
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Existing JSONL stores still work; older ideas without dossier paths are reported as missing dossier and can be reconstructed from existing artifacts.

data_model_changes.name: ideas.jsonl idea record
data_model_changes.migration_notes: New fields aliases, dossier_path, and detail_path are optional for old records.

security_implications: The storage contract explicitly excludes tokens, secrets, private user data, edit tokens, and raw unavailable page content.
migration_notes: Existing runs do not gain dossiers automatically; future scheduled runs should create them. Older ideas can still be reconstructed from JSONL/report/chat artifacts if needed.
